title: Jodi Tims Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Jodi Tims Khoury Story - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Jodi Tims
Khoury Staff
Key Figure in the Growth of the Align Program
After years of work uplifting women in computing, Jodi Tims was excited to discover the Align program’s commitment to increasing diversity in the field. Now serving as the Associate Dean of Network Programs for Khoury College, she aims to create even more opportunities in tech for students of all backgrounds.
Seeing the impact that the program has on the student’s life, hearing their stories, getting chances to talk to them about how much they appreciate the program, and then connect with them again after they graduate and find out that they’re being successful. That’s the ultimate thing that we’re doing in this program … we’re serving students and giving them opportunity
Jodi Tims, Associate Dean of Network Programs
Explore all Khoury Stories
